title: The Silent Witness: The Case of the Boy in the Box

scenes.text: A child's body discovered in a box sparked one of Philadelphia's biggest mysteries.
This tragedy occurred in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.
In 1957, the body of an unidentified boy was found in a cardboard box.
Despite efforts to identify the boy, his identity and cause of death remain a mystery.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED CASE

scenes.text: Follow because some cases still need answers.

description: 📍 Philadelphia, USA - 1957. A young boy's body was found abandoned in a box, his identity and story lost to time. Follow for daily cold cases!
